Privacy Policy More Menu News Stanlaw Abbey Children’s Centre to become Best Start Family Hub Stanlaw Abbey transformation to strengthen support for families News 27 April 2026 £2.1m secured for Cheshire College to upgrade facilities Funding has been made available to upgrade and modernise Cheshire College - South & West. News 27 April 2026 £1.2m boost for heritage and culture in Port Sunlight and Ellesmere Port Almost £1.2 million has been secured to support heritage, culture and young people in Ellesmere Port News 27 April 2026 Electric vans rolled out at Ellesmere Port Royal Mail depot Royal Mail is rolling out locally-built electric vans at its Ellesmere Port depot. News 27 April 2026 Illegal tobacco crackdown sees Ellesmere Port shops shut down Illegal tobacco shops shut in Ellesmere Port News 27 April 2026 Port Sunlight pupils quiz MP after Parliament visit Justin Madders MP meets Year 6 pupils at Church Drive Primary School in Port Sunlight. News 27 April 2026 Discussing Importance of Sign Language Access Justin Madders MP learns about economic case for early access to British Sign Language. News 27 April 2026 Pride in Place Latest: Shaping Ellesmere Port’s Future Members of the public shared regeneration ideas at the Pride in Place drop-in. News 27 April 2026 Labour’s Employment Rights Act delivers first benefits for local workers Day One Rights at Work begin under Labour. News 27 April 2026 Ellesmere Port pupils take their questions to Westminster Justin Madders MP meets pupils from The Acorns Primary and Nursery School in Ellesmere Port.
